_meta.note: ROUTE-TO-CLUSTER unavailable for all 27 verses — no other-cluster terms co-occur at any BOUNDARY verse record. All dispositions are SET-ASIDE or PROMOTE-TO-SUBGROUP. Three verses require researcher confirmation before CC applies; their rows are marked RESEARCHER-REVIEW-REQUIRED with embedded recommendations.

dispositions.set_aside_reason: Minimal inner-being content — term describes an external physical practice being repudiated; no shame, disgrace, or humiliation inner-being content carried by this term in this verse.
Outward physical description only — extreme disfigurement causing observer-astonishment; no inner shame, disgrace, or humiliation evidenced by this term in this verse.

dispositions.rationale: Pass A explicitly names shame as the produced inner state. The term carries moral-filth as the causal mechanism producing shame — sin to filth-exposure to despised to shame-posture. M07-B moral-consequence register. Phase 9 T6 note: M12 purity dimension should be addressed when M12 opens.
God's sovereign bringing-low as a divine prerogative that strips status and exaltation from persons.
God's eyes on the haughty to bring them down — abasement directed at the proud inner disposition of self-exaltation.
Abasement as the inner consequence of pride — humbling of an arrogant disposition by divine action.
God commanding the proud to be abased — crushing of inner pride by divine force and anger.
Haughty eyes — proud inner disposition expressed through arrogant perception — specifically brought down by divine correction.
God alone executing judgment of putting down — abasement as an act of divine will, not self-caused or socially determined.

dispositions.set_aside_reason: sha.phel here describes God's own condescending act of lowering his gaze to behold heaven and earth — not a human inner-being state; no shame, disgrace, or humiliation of human persons evidenced; outside M07's human-inner-being scope.

dispositions.rationale: The Lord casting the wicked to the ground — enforced abasement of the proud wicked, downward reversal of their standing.

dispositions.recommended_set_aside_reason: sha.phel names voluntary lowliness of spirit as a positive moral stance — not shame, disgrace, or humiliation; M09 characteristic; no M09 target term available for routing; outside M07 scope. Note for M09 session open: verse awaits pickup.
dispositions.alternative_note: New sub-group M07-I (voluntary lowliness as counterpart to enforced humiliation) — analytically creates scope-creep toward M09.

dispositions.rationale: Experienced sting of public demotion — being moved to a lower place before a noble. Enforced social abasement and inner wound accompanying it. Fits M07-D-VCG-01 (social/bodily demotion).

dispositions.recommended_set_aside_reason: sha.phel carries both enforced-abasement of pride and voluntary-lowliness-leading-to-honour; verse cannot be split; distinctive M09-register contribution means same reasoning as Pro 16:19 applies. Note for M09 session open: verse awaits pickup.
dispositions.alternative_note: Focuses on 'pride brings him low' half. Defensible if researcher judges enforced-abasement content sufficient for M07-D inclusion.

dispositions.rationale: God-imposed leveling of humanity under divine judgment; permanent, unforgiving character underscored.
Haughty looks and lofty pride brought low so the Lord alone is exalted — Day of the Lord targeting the inner disposition of self-exaltation.
Lord's day against all that is proud, lofty, and lifted up — God's sovereign act against inner arrogance expressed in worldly exaltation.
Haughtiness and lofty pride brought low so the Lord alone stands exalted.
Man humbled; eyes of the haughty specifically brought low — inner faculty of proud perception defeated.
God's terrifying power lopping down the great and lofty — forceful, involuntary abasement by sovereign force.
God laying low the pompous pride of the arrogant — abasement as divinely intended outcome for inner arrogance.
The Lord laying low Moab's pompous pride — inner disposition and outward confident expression both targeted.
God humbling proud inhabitants and their lofty city, casting to dust — complete reversal of elevated self-positioning.
Jerusalem brought so low as to whisper from the dust — complete inversion of dignity, most extreme physical expression of enforced abasement.
King and queen mother commanded to take lowly seats — inner abasement of losing royal dignity publicly enacted. Fits M07-D-VCG-01 (social/bodily demotion).

dispositions.recommended_rationale: High tree brought low by God's sovereign judicial act in punitive context (Eze 17 parable); primary content is divine lowering of the exalted, fitting M07-D-VCG-03 (divine abasement of pride).
dispositions.alternative_note: If the structural-reversal tree metaphor is judged not to evidence a specific human inner-being state directly enough.

dispositions.rationale: Turban and crown removed by divine decree, high brought low — enforced reversal of honour and dignity over human pride. 'Bring low that which is exalted' names the characteristic directly.

term_level_decisions.rationale: 0 is_relevant verses. Single verse (vc=65596 Lev 21:20) was set aside at Phase 1 — physical bodily conditions, no inner-being content. No analytical basis for keeping te.val.lul in M07. Recommend researcher review mti_term record for removal from M07 cluster or confirmation as permanently inactive.
